%!TEX program = xelatex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{polyglossia}
\setmainlanguage{english}
\setotherlanguage{arabic}

% En Windows, Times New Roman tiene soporte completo de caracteres árabes y está garantizado en el sistema.
\newfontfamily\arabicfont[Script=Arabic]{Times New Roman}

\title{Mixed Language Arabic and English Fixture}
\author{Strata Reader Project}
\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
This document contains both English (left-to-right) and Arabic (right-to-left) text to evaluate multi-language and multi-directional text extraction capability.

\section{Bilingual Content}
Here is a paragraph in Arabic:

\begin{Arabic}
هذا نص باللغة العربية لاختبار قدرة محرك الاستخراج على التعامل مع النصوص ثنائية الاتجاه واللغات المختلطة.
\end{Arabic}

And here is a translation in English:
"This is an Arabic text to test the extraction engine's ability to handle bidirectional texts and mixed languages."

\end{document}
